label: L3 High (exploratory widened trajectory)
description: Exploratory only. Widens trajectory priors to reflect deeper scenario disagreement: CAV/STI target triangulars span wider 2075 outcomes, growth-rate sigmas increase 50 percent, efficiency-doubling triangular widens to [1.0, 2.8, 7.0] years. Produces much wider bands after ~2035; useful for illustrating long-horizon divergence but NOT paper-safe.

notes.label_in_ui: exploratory; must not be used for headline numbers
notes.warning: This preset is the primary driver of the post-2030 uncertainty-width blow-up in historical Monte Carlo outputs. It is retained only for illustrative long-horizon what-if views.
